title: Steven C. Hayes
blurb: The originator of Acceptance & Commitment Therapy.
lead: The psychologist who developed ACT and the concept of psychological flexibility.

blocks.text: Steven C. Hayes is a psychologist who developed Acceptance and Commitment Therapy (ACT) and its underlying model of psychological flexibility.
His work has generated a large evidence base for accepting difficult experiences while committing to valued action.
Free ACT resources like Russ Harris's 'The Happiness Trap' materials are an accessible way into the approach Hayes founded.

resources.title: The Happiness Trap — free resources
resources.whyHere: Free, accessible ACT worksheets and videos.
